label: Visual Art & Architecture
description:
Painting movements from Palaeolithic cave art (Chauvet, Lascaux, Altamira) through 20th century abstraction, plus East Asian (ukiyo-e, Kano, shanshui), South Asian (Mughal, Rajput), Islamic (Persian miniature, calligraphy, geometric art), and Pre-Columbian traditions. Architectural styles from Egyptian pyramids and Greek orders to Bauhaus, Brutalism, and Metabolism. Painting techniques (fresco, tempera, oil, sfumato, chiaroscuro) and structural elements (arch, vault, dome, flying buttress, dougong, muqarnas).

Import scripts: Metropolitan Museum Open Access API (paintings pre-1900), Wikidata notable historic buildings.

Atom IDs: art:movement:*, art:technique:*, arch:style:*, arch:element:*, arch:building:*, art:work:*
